understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' in the current BP35 level without dying, doing so efficiently within the limited turns/steps and attempts.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn selects an action (e.g., MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN or other level-specific interactions). After a move, gravity (currently DOWN) applies so the player will fall until supported, and the run ends immediately if the player lands on a spike/hazard tile. Levels allow 2 attempts; each attempt is limited to 50 turns/step budget. If an attempt fails (death/out of turns), the level restarts and the failure is recorded in recent context. Undo, when available, would revert the last action/state, including position and any triggered effects.
